title: Core Models Path

steps.title: n-gram models
steps.summary: n-gram models belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Core Models. Compare it with Seq2Seq Models and Two-Tower Models. It opens into N-gram Deletion and N-gram Reversal.
